features: 【All in One Travel Plug Adapter】AUNNO travel adapter worldwide all in 1 design makes it easy to use. Built in UK, EU, AU, US plug, you can easily use it in over 150 countries while you are travelling. Within extra USB and USB-C ports, there's no need for you to bring extra chargers

【2400W High Power Plug Adapter】Maximum rated power up to 2400W, and equipped with two USB ports and two USB C port, the intelligent IC chip will automatically adjust the power output according to the product being charged. No need to worry about devices damage from overheating
【Multiple Safety Protection】AUNNO universal travel adapter is made of PC fire-retardant material, there is a 10A fuse and a spare fuse inside, no need worry about the fire caused by short circuit

【Compact Design for Easy Portability】AUNNO universal plug adapter weighs less than 120 grams (0.265 lbs) and its size is smaller than the palm of your hand (54x 67 x 52 mm). All-in-one input concept meets your various travel needs and saves you plenty of luggage space, no need to carry extra plug adapters
【Multi-national Safety Certification】AUNNO products have passed rigorous tests in laboratories in various countries and have obtained UKCA, CE, FCC, ROHS and other certificates.
